positive: A cyberpunk portrait of a majestic koi fish swimming through a neon-lit, rain-slicked Tokyo streetscape. The fish has glowing, holographic scales, surrounded by glowing Japanese kanji characters and dripping neon signs. Synthwave aesthetic, dramatic lighting, high contrast, 8k digital painting.
negative: ugly, deformed, blurry, low quality, watermark, text, bad anatomy, extra limbs, duplicate elements, muted colors, pastel, sketch, childish
